results.rendered_html: adhana (3. a + dhana) adj. keinen eigenen Besitz habend, besitzlos: bhāryā putraśca dāsaśca traya evādhanāḥ smṛtāḥ . yatte samadhigacchanti yasya te tasya taddhanam ..  M. 8,416 . unbemittelt, arm  AK. 3,4,179  (vgl. corrigg.).  N. 17,43  (Gegens. samṛddha).  R. 1,15,18 . 3,4,20 .  SUŚR. 2,79,12 .  PAÑCAT. II, 110 .

results.rendered_html:
adhana a. [na. ba.]
1 Without wealth, poor.
2 Not entitled or competent to possess independent property (in law); bhāryā putraśca dāsaśca traya evādhanāḥ smṛtāḥ . yatte samadhigacchaṃti yasya te tasya taddhanam ..  Ms. 8. 416.
